items.titolo: The feature Apple needs to make HomePod stand out isn't audio-related
items.descrizione: Few smart speakers have assistants with as much potential as Siri. A meaningful upgrade would make the HomePod my first choice.

items.titolo: Google userà le GPU NVIDIA di SpaceX per Gemini Enterprise
items.descrizione: Google pagherà 920 milioni di dollari al mese per usare circa 110.000 GPU NVIDIA di SpaceX, necessarie per soddisfare la domanda di Gemini Enterprise. The post Google userà le GPU NVIDIA di SpaceX per Gemini Enterprise a

items.titolo: Crypto-Funded Chinese Peptide Labs Are Booming
items.descrizione: Plus: Hackers use Meta’s AI bots to hack Instagram accounts, Anthropic helps NSA hackers, a decades-long GPS satellite mystery may have been solved, and more.

items.titolo: Huawei-led team claims it post-trained DeepSeek's 1.6-trillion-parameter model — 1,000 Ascend 910C chips used in training
items.descrizione: A research group that includes Huawei Technologies says it completed full-parameter post-training of DeepSeek's V4-Pro, a 1.6-trillion-parameter model.
